endpoints.name: GET /rest-service/auth-v1/login
endpoints.description:
Get the user authentication token.
 
 This is a legacy version of the login request. Using GET is deprecated as your password is likely to appear in logs which record request URLs.
 Use the POST version instead.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required.

endpoints.name: POST /rest-service/auth-v1/login
endpoints.description: Get the user authentication token.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required.

endpoints.name: GET /rest-service/projects-v1
endpoints.description: Get the list of projects that the authenticated user is entitled to access.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required.

endpoints.name: GET /rest-service/projects-v1/{key}
endpoints.description: Returns a project description.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{KEY}} with a real key.

endpoints.name: GET /rest-service/repositories-v1
endpoints.description: Returns a list of all repositories. This includes plugin provided repositories
endpoints.notes: No authentication required.

endpoints.name: GET /rest-service/repositories-v1/browse/{repository}/{path}
endpoints.description: Lists the contents of the specified directory.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{PATH}} with a real path. Replace {{REPOSITORY}} with a real repository.

endpoints.name: GET /rest-service/repositories-v1/change/{repository}/{revision}
endpoints.description: Represents a particular changeset.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{REVISION}} with a real revision. Replace {{REPOSITORY}} with a real repository.

endpoints.name: GET /rest-service/repositories-v1/changes/{repository}/{path}
endpoints.description: Represents a sorted list of changesets, newest first.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{PATH}} with a real path. Replace {{REPOSITORY}} with a real repository.

endpoints.name: GET /rest-service/repositories-v1/content/{repository}/{revision}/{path}
endpoints.description:
Returns the raw content of the specified file revision as a binary
 stream. No attempt is made to identify the content type and no mime
 type is provided.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{PATH}} with a real path. Replace {{REVISION}} with a real revision. Replace {{REPOSITORY}} with a real repository.

endpoints.name: GET /rest-service/repositories-v1/history/{repository}/{revision}/{path}
endpoints.description: Represents the history of a versioned entity.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{PATH}} with a real path. Replace {{REVISION}} with a real revision. Replace {{REPOSITORY}} with a real repository.

endpoints.name: GET /rest-service/repositories-v1/{repository}
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{REPOSITORY}} with a real repository.

endpoints.name: GET /rest-service/repositories-v1/{repository}/svn
endpoints.description: For backward compatibility we provide this method, but repositories should be referred to just by their key.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{REPOSITORY}} with a real repository.

endpoints.name: GET /rest-service/repositories-v1/{repository}/{revision}/{path}
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{PATH}} with a real path. Replace {{REVISION}} with a real revision. Replace {{REPOSITORY}} with a real repository.

endpoints.name: GET /rest-service/reviews-v1
endpoints.notes: No authentication required.

endpoints.name: POST /rest-service/reviews-v1
endpoints.notes: No authentication required.

endpoints.name: GET /rest-service/reviews-v1/details
endpoints.description:
Retrieves all reviews that are in one of the the specified states. For each review all details are included (review items + comments). The
 wiki rendered comments will be available via the <messageAsHtml> element
endpoints.notes: No authentication required.

endpoints.name: GET /rest-service/reviews-v1/filter
endpoints.description: To ignore a property, omit it from the query string.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required.

endpoints.name: POST /rest-service/reviews-v1/filter
endpoints.description:
This method should no longer be used, as it uses a POST for a read-only
 retrieval operation and is provided for backward compatibility only.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required.

endpoints.name: GET /rest-service/reviews-v1/filter/details
endpoints.description: To ignore a property, omit it from the query string.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required.

endpoints.name: POST /rest-service/reviews-v1/filter/details
endpoints.description:
This method should no longer be used, as it uses a POST for a read-only
 retrieval operation and is provided for backward compatibility only.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required.

endpoints.name: GET /rest-service/reviews-v1/filter/{filter}
endpoints.description: Get all the reviews which match the given filter, for the current user.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{FILTER}} with a real filter.

endpoints.name: GET /rest-service/reviews-v1/filter/{filter}/details
endpoints.description: Gets a list of all the reviews that match the specified filter criteria.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{FILTER}} with a real filter.

endpoints.name: GET /rest-service/reviews-v1/metrics/{version}
endpoints.description: Get comment metrics metadata for the specified metrics version.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{VERSION}} with a real version.

endpoints.name: GET /rest-service/reviews-v1/search/{repository}
endpoints.description: Return a list of Reviews which include a particular file.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{REPOSITORY}} with a real repository.

endpoints.name: GET /rest-service/reviews-v1/search/{repository}/details
endpoints.description: Return a list of Reviews which include a particular file.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{REPOSITORY}} with a real repository.

endpoints.name: GET /rest-service/reviews-v1/versionInfo
endpoints.description: Returns Crucible version information.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required.

endpoints.name: GET /rest-service/reviews-v1/{id}
endpoints.description:
Get a single review by its permId (e.g. "CR-45").
 If the review does not exist, a 404 is returned.
 
 The moderator element may not exist if the review does not have a Moderator.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: DELETE /rest-service/reviews-v1/{id}
endpoints.description:
Permanently deletes the specified review.
 The review must have been abandoned.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: GET /rest-service/reviews-v1/{id}/actions
endpoints.description:
Get a list of the actions which the current user is allowed to perform
 on the review.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: POST /rest-service/reviews-v1/{id}/addChangeset
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: POST /rest-service/reviews-v1/{id}/addFile
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: POST /rest-service/reviews-v1/{id}/addPatch
endpoints.description: Old, non-restful name. Kept for backwards compatibility. Exactly the same as POSTing to /{id}/patch
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: POST /rest-service/reviews-v1/{id}/close
endpoints.description: Closes the given review with the summary given.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: GET /rest-service/reviews-v1/{id}/comments
endpoints.description: Return all the comments visible to the requesting user for the review.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: POST /rest-service/reviews-v1/{id}/comments
endpoints.description: Add a general comment to the review.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: GET /rest-service/reviews-v1/{id}/comments/general
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: POST /rest-service/reviews-v1/{id}/comments/markAllAsRead
endpoints.description:
For the effective user, mark all comments in a review as read (except
 those marked as leave unread).
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: GET /rest-service/reviews-v1/{id}/comments/versioned
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: GET /rest-service/reviews-v1/{id}/comments/{cId}
endpoints.description: Gets the given comment.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id. Replace {{CID}} with a real cid.

endpoints.name: POST /rest-service/reviews-v1/{id}/comments/{cId}
endpoints.description: Updates the comment given by the perma id to the new comment posted.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id. Replace {{CID}} with a real cid.

endpoints.name: DELETE /rest-service/reviews-v1/{id}/comments/{cId}
endpoints.description: Deletes the given comment.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id. Replace {{CID}} with a real cid.

endpoints.name: POST /rest-service/reviews-v1/{id}/comments/{cId}/markAsLeaveUnread
endpoints.description: Marks the comment as leave unread to the current user - it will not automatically be marked as read by crucible.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id. Replace {{CID}} with a real cid.

endpoints.name: POST /rest-service/reviews-v1/{id}/comments/{cId}/markAsRead
endpoints.description: Mark the given comment as read for the user used to make this POST.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id. Replace {{CID}} with a real cid.

endpoints.name: GET /rest-service/reviews-v1/{id}/comments/{cId}/replies
endpoints.description: Gets the replies to the given comment.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id. Replace {{CID}} with a real cid.

endpoints.name: POST /rest-service/reviews-v1/{id}/comments/{cId}/replies
endpoints.description:
Adds a reply to the given comment. This call includes the  repsonse header that
 contains the URL of the newly created entity.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id. Replace {{CID}} with a real cid.

endpoints.name: POST /rest-service/reviews-v1/{id}/comments/{cId}/replies/{rId}
endpoints.description: Updates a reply with the given newComment.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id. Replace {{RID}} with a real rid. Replace {{CID}} with a real cid.

endpoints.name: DELETE /rest-service/reviews-v1/{id}/comments/{cId}/replies/{rId}
endpoints.description: Deletes the reply.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id. Replace {{RID}} with a real rid. Replace {{CID}} with a real cid.

endpoints.name: POST /rest-service/reviews-v1/{id}/complete
endpoints.description: Completes the review for the current user
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: GET /rest-service/reviews-v1/{id}/details
endpoints.description: Returns the specified review.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: GET /rest-service/reviews-v1/{id}/patch
endpoints.description: Get a list of patches and their details for the given review
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: POST /rest-service/reviews-v1/{id}/patch
endpoints.description: Add the revisions in a patch to an existing review.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: DELETE /rest-service/reviews-v1/{id}/patch/{patchId}
endpoints.description: Removes the patch with the given id from the review. All of the revisions provided by the patch will be removed as well.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id. Replace {{PATCHID}} with a real patchid.

endpoints.name: POST /rest-service/reviews-v1/{id}/publish
endpoints.description: Publishes all the draft comments of the current user.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: POST /rest-service/reviews-v1/{id}/publish/{cId}
endpoints.description: publishes the given draft comment.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id. Replace {{CID}} with a real cid.

endpoints.name: POST /rest-service/reviews-v1/{id}/remind
endpoints.description: Immediately send a reminder to incomplete reviewers about the given review.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: GET /rest-service/reviews-v1/{id}/reviewers
endpoints.description: Get a list of reviewers in the review given by the permaid id.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: POST /rest-service/reviews-v1/{id}/reviewers
endpoints.description: Adds the given list of reviewers to the review.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: GET /rest-service/reviews-v1/{id}/reviewers/completed
endpoints.description: Gets a list of completed reviewers.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: GET /rest-service/reviews-v1/{id}/reviewers/uncompleted
endpoints.description: Gets a list of reviewers that have not completed the review.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: DELETE /rest-service/reviews-v1/{id}/reviewers/{username}
endpoints.description: Removes the reviewer from the review.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id. Replace {{USERNAME}} with a real username.

endpoints.name: GET /rest-service/reviews-v1/{id}/reviewitems
endpoints.description: Returns a list of all the items in a review.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: POST /rest-service/reviews-v1/{id}/reviewitems
endpoints.description: Add the changes between two files in a fisheye repository to the review.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: POST /rest-service/reviews-v1/{id}/reviewitems/details
endpoints.description:
Adds the given review item to the review. This will always create a new review item, even if there is an existing
 one with the same data in the review (in which case the existing item will be replaced).
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: POST /rest-service/reviews-v1/{id}/reviewitems/revisions
endpoints.description: Adds a review item for each of the supplied crucibleRevisionData elements.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: GET /rest-service/reviews-v1/{id}/reviewitems/{riId}
endpoints.description: Returns detailed information for a specific review item.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id. Replace {{RIID}} with a real riid.

endpoints.name: DELETE /rest-service/reviews-v1/{id}/reviewitems/{riId}
endpoints.description: Removes an item from a review.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id. Replace {{RIID}} with a real riid.

endpoints.name: GET /rest-service/reviews-v1/{id}/reviewitems/{riId}/comments
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id. Replace {{RIID}} with a real riid.

endpoints.name: POST /rest-service/reviews-v1/{id}/reviewitems/{riId}/comments
endpoints.description: This call includes the  repsonse header that contains the URL of the newly created entity.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id. Replace {{RIID}} with a real riid.

endpoints.name: PUT /rest-service/reviews-v1/{id}/reviewitems/{riId}/details
endpoints.description:
Sets the review item specified by itemId with the given reviewItem. The old review item is discarded. Can only
 perform this operation if the old review item specified by itemId can be deleted. The old review item's permId is
 not changed.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id. Replace {{RIID}} with a real riid.

endpoints.name: POST /rest-service/reviews-v1/{id}/reviewitems/{riId}/revisions
endpoints.description:
Adds the given list of revisions to the supplied review item, merging if required. For example, if the review
 item for  contains revisions 3 to 6, and if:
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id. Replace {{RIID}} with a real riid.

endpoints.name: DELETE /rest-service/reviews-v1/{id}/reviewitems/{riId}/revisions
endpoints.description:
Removes the revisions given from the review item in the review specified by the id. If the review item has no
 more revisions left, it is automatically deleted.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id. Replace {{RIID}} with a real riid.

endpoints.name: POST /rest-service/reviews-v1/{id}/transition
endpoints.description: Change the state of a review by performing an action on it.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: GET /rest-service/reviews-v1/{id}/transitions
endpoints.description:
Get a list of the actions which the current user can perform on this
 review, given its current state and the user's permissions.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: POST /rest-service/reviews-v1/{id}/uncomplete
endpoints.description: Uncompletes the review for the current user.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: GET /rest-service/search-v1/reviews
endpoints.description: Search for reviews where the name, description, state or permaId contain the specified term.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required.

endpoints.name: GET /rest-service/search-v1/reviewsForIssue
endpoints.description: Get a list of all reviews that have been linked to the specified JIRA issue key.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required.

endpoints.name: GET /rest-service/users-v1
endpoints.description: Get a list of all the users. You can also ask for a set of users.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required.

endpoints.name: GET /rest-service/users-v1/{repository}/{username}
endpoints.description: Returns the user details of the user mapped to a committer in a repository.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{USERNAME}} with a real username. Replace {{REPOSITORY}} with a real repository.

endpoints.name: GET /rest-service/users-v1/{username}
endpoints.description: Returns the user's profile details.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{USERNAME}} with a real username.
